conflicts.description: The prior continuity sheet said Nura was absent in chapter_12, but the manuscript follows her day trip to the neighboring char; she is away from Kadam Char, not absent from the chapter.
conflicts.canonical_value: Nura is present throughout the novel; chapter_12 takes her off-char on a day trip.
conflicts.resolution_note: Updated the sheet to match the manuscript's direct on-page action in chapter_12.

conflicts.description: The prior sheet treated Nura's father line as a purely false administrative invention, but the manuscript establishes that Monir Hossain was a real dredging worker tied to Saleha; Halima later formalized his name on Nura's papers without certainty of biological paternity.
conflicts.canonical_value: Monir Hossain was a real dredging worker Saleha was with; Halima later used his name as Nura's paper father after Saleha's death, but biological paternity remains unverified.
conflicts.resolution_note: Updated the sheet because the manuscript repeats this version across Halima's ledger note, Halima's oral account, and Nura's off-char investigation.

conflicts.description: Rahima's birth-detail testimony says Kashem's cord was around his neck twice in chapter_04, but once in the chapter_15 hearing.
conflicts.canonical_value: Kashem's cord was around his neck once.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chose the chapter_15 hearing version because it is the formal public testimony tied to the appeal record; the exact count is otherwise causally minor.
